status_notes: CSAF provider. Created from CERT-Bund aggregator + provider-metadata.json data.
notes: Open-Xchange GmbH develops email, communication, and collaboration software including OX App Suite and Dovecot. Their security team publishes advisories in CSAF format covering OX App Suite and Dovecot products.

data.description: Machine-readable security advisories in CSAF format covering OX App Suite and Dovecot products.
data.notes: CSAF csaf_trusted_provider. Contact: security@open-xchange.com. Separate advisory paths for App Suite and Dovecot.
